sourceWarning: The current restaurant-issued dinner, brunch, and happy-hour pages define the catalog. The restaurant-linked Toast ordering page is used only for overlapping item details and explicit positive disclosures, not to add takeout-only products. The online FAQ says printed gluten-free, vegetarian, and dairy-free menus exist but does not publish them. Its blanket no-peanut statement conflicts with a current Toast peanut warning and is therefore not used as a negative assurance. No complete allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure is available online.
